name: context-pack
description: Repo-local context packs and handoff checkpoints for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Generate focused repo context for agents.
interface.longDescription: Context Pack keeps a lightweight repo-local context library, checkpoints handoff state, and generates task or review packs so coding agents can start from relevant files, contracts, tests, and stale warnings instead of rereading the repository.
defaultPrompt: Build a review context pack for my changes.
Checkpoint this work for the next session.
